meta.title: OWL Intelligence — Advanced Analytics Grounded in Field Data
meta.description: Decision-support products for institutions combining validated field data, structured analytics, and AI.

hero.headline: Advanced Analytics Grounded in Field Data
hero.body: OWL Intelligence develops decision-support products for institutions by combining validated field data, structured analytics, and AI governed within a clear oversight framework.
hero.metric1Label: Provinces of field coverage across Turkey
hero.metric3Label: AI-supported decision products in the ecosystem

businessSpeed.heading: Business moves faster than traditional data
businessSpeed.statement1: Static measurement cannot keep pace with changing conditions.
businessSpeed.statement3: Better decisions require higher-frequency, ground-level evidence.

value.heading: Measurement, analytics, and AI in one decision-support layer
value.body: OWL Intelligence brings measurement, analytics, and AI together within a single decision-support layer. It continuously monitors real-world conditions, processes emerging signals, and makes them usable for institutional contexts.
value.col1Body: Continuously monitors real-world conditions through structured fieldwork and validated data pipelines.
value.col2Body: Transforms raw signals into analytical structures that connect directly to decision-making processes.
value.col3Body: Governed AI layers interpret findings, explain patterns, and deliver decision-ready intelligence.

productEcosystem.heading: An integrated structure that turns field data into stronger decisions
productEcosystem.intro: Our product ecosystem provides an integrated structure that turns field data into stronger measurement, analysis, and decision support.
productEcosystem.fwbmDescriptor: Next-generation household financial resilience measurement at institutional scale.
productEcosystem.fuzzyowlDescriptor: Makes visible which variables shape decisions, how they influence each other, and how interventions affect the system as a whole.
productEcosystem.econimpactDescriptor: Measures the economic footprint of companies through deterministic value creation models and AI-based reporting. Delivered as a SaaS platform with expert support for custom institutional reporting.

intelligenceLayer.heading: Eight integrated stages from raw signal to institutional decision
intelligenceLayer.step01Body: Each product begins with an embedded methodology that defines what is measured and how it is measured.
intelligenceLayer.step02Body: A regular, structured, and highly reliable flow of real-world data is generated through fieldwork.
intelligenceLayer.step03Body: The AuditorAI layer subjects the data to quality, consistency, and validation checks, creating a fully validated foundation.
intelligenceLayer.step04Body: Validated field data is brought together with integrated databases and relevant external data sources within a single data structure.
intelligenceLayer.step05Body: The ClassifyAI layer organizes the data into meaningful categories, labels it, and prepares it for analysis.
intelligenceLayer.step06Body: Deterministic computation engines consistently generate indicators, scores, segments, and decision rules.
intelligenceLayer.step07Body: Processed data becomes trackable, comparable, and ready for institutional use through live dashboards.
intelligenceLayer.step08Body: Governed AI analysis assistants such as Monet and FuzzyOwl interpret findings, explain patterns, and complete the analytical layer.

sectors.heading: Built for institutions that operate at complexity
sectors.context: Nine sectors. One coherent intelligence infrastructure.

whyOwl.heading: Not a research firm. An intelligence infrastructure.
whyOwl.intro: Unlike conventional research firms, OWL Intelligence does not leave data confined to reports; it turns data into productized analytics and decision support. With more than 15 years of experience, a field network spanning all 81 provinces of Turkey, and in-house technology capabilities, it transforms research into an infrastructure that operates at institutional scale.
whyOwl.diff1Body: Drawing on deep methodological expertise shaped by national and international projects, our team specializes in quantitative, qualitative, mixed, and experimental methods.
whyOwl.diff2Body: OWL Intelligence does not simply collect data; it transforms it into analytical structures that connect directly to decision-making processes.
whyOwl.diff3Body: Our technology and software infrastructure is developed in-house and designed with a product logic.

founders.heading: Built from a conviction, not a gap in the market

beyza.quote: We built OWL because institutions kept making critical decisions on data that was already six months old — and the technology to fix that already existed.
beyza.name: Beyza Polat

saygin.quote: Field research told us everything we needed to know. The gap was never the data — it was the infrastructure to make it actionable at scale.
saygin.name: Saygın Vedat Alkurt

partnerships.heading: Open to those who want to build and grow together
partnerships.body: OWL Intelligence is open to working with stakeholders who want to build, grow, and open up new areas together. We see strategic partnerships and institutional collaboration as a natural part of our long-term vision.

agent.heading: Ask anything you would like to know about OWL Intelligence.
agent.subCopy: Our AI agent is available to answer questions about our products, methodology, and how we work with institutions.

contactDemo.heading: Start a conversation.
contactDemo.body: Whether you're exploring for your institution, looking to invest, or interested in collaboration, we're ready to talk.
contactDemo.cardHeading: Ready to see it in action?

solutions.bankingDesc: Risk assessment, consumer confidence tracking, and market sentiment for financial decision-making.
solutions.fmcgDesc: Consumer behavior insights, brand perception monitoring, and demand forecasting.
solutions.publicDesc: Policy impact analysis, public sentiment tracking, and evidence-based governance support.
solutions.investorsDesc: Alternative data for investment decisions, ESG sentiment tracking, and market intelligence.
solutions.researchDesc: Deep analytical tools for strategy teams, consultancies, and academic research.

aboutPage.description: Building AI-powered intelligence products grounded in authentic field data.
aboutPage.standout: Verified field data, shaped into decision-ready intelligence.
aboutPage.bodyOne: OWL Intelligence is a UK-based technology and research company, with R&D and operations in Turkey including Kadir Has Teknopark, developing commercial AI products that transform real-world field data into actionable business intelligence.
aboutPage.bodyTwo: We operate at the intersection of rigorous research methodology and modern artificial intelligence.
aboutPage.bodyThree: Our flagship product, FWBM, continuously measures household-level financial stress and resilience through authentic field surveys, weekly-updated dashboards, AI-assisted querying, and integrated macro data. Our second product, FuzzyOwl, brings Fuzzy Cognitive Mapping to strategic decision-making, enabling organizations to model complex systems and simulate scenarios. EconImpact delivers self-administered, automated economic impact reports for institutions and companies.
aboutPage.bodyFour: We believe that the most valuable intelligence comes from verified human data, not scraped feeds or synthetic estimates. Our technology stack is designed to preserve this authenticity while making the insights accessible, interactive, and commercially actionable.
aboutPage.indicatorOne: More than 15 years in social and economic research
aboutPage.indicatorTwo: Field capacity in 81 provinces and all districts across Turkey
aboutPage.indicatorThree: Trusted relationships across sectors, academia, and international organizations

foundersPage.title: The People Behind OWL Intelligence
foundersPage.description: OWL Intelligence is built by founders combining applied economics, sociology, field research, and data-driven strategy.

beyza.name: Beyza Polat
beyza.bioOne: Beyza Polat is the founder and managing director of SEAL Consulting. She is an economist with expertise in analyzing large-scale datasets and developing and implementing quantitative research tools that support decision-making in public and private enterprises.
beyza.bioTwo: Since 2014, she has worked as a team leader and/or consultant on joint projects with institutions including the Ministry of Industry and Technology, Ministry of Trade, the World Bank, the United Nations High Commissioner for Refugees, the United Nations Development Programme, the Turkish Employment Agency, and SAS Institute.
beyza.bioThree: She has experience in quantitative impact evaluation, programme evaluation, regional economic analysis, labour market assessment, and sectoral economic analysis. She also provides executive training to public institutions and the private sector on data analytics and impact evaluation. She previously served as a faculty member in the Department of Economics at Ozyegin University, where she taught Statistics, Econometrics, and Applied Microeconometrics, and has also taught undergraduate and graduate courses at Bilkent University and LSE. Beyza holds a bachelor's degree in Business Administration from Bilkent University and graduate degrees in Economics from Bilkent University and the London School of Economics and Political Science.

saygin.name: Saygın Vedat Alkurt
saygin.bioOne: With over 15+ years of interdisciplinary research experience, he has contributed to and led numerous academic, public, and civil society projects across Turkey, particularly in fields such as political sociology, communication, youth studies, and strategic consultancy. He currently serves as the General Director of Adhoc Research and Consultancy, which he co-founded, and as the Chairperson of CORE Institute (Collective Research Association), an NGO focusing on generational change, urban mobility, and socio-cultural transformation.
saygin.bioTwo: He is also a lecturer at Kadir Has University's Faculty of Communication and sits on the Advisory Board of the Department of Political Science and Public Administration at the same university.
saygin.bioThree: Alkurt's portfolio spans research design, qualitative and quantitative analysis, monitoring and evaluation, and data-driven policy consulting for international organizations such as UNDP, European Union institutions, and TUBITAK. He is known for bridging data and narrative, combining robust field methodologies with participatory approaches to produce actionable insights for social impact. Throughout his career, he has maintained a strong focus on public interest research and the intersection of societal behavior, governance, and policy.

footer.description: AI-powered intelligence products grounded in authentic field data.
